svg.title: Mermaid rect nesting and fragments
svg.desc: Demonstrates nested Mermaid rect highlights and their interaction with structural fragments. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/15-rect-nesting-and-fragments/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/15-rect-nesting-and-fragments
svg.text: Demonstrates nested Mermaid rect highlights and their interaction with structural fragments.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
1. Outer same-start write [Mermaid: Service->>DB: Outer same-start write]
2. Inner same-start warm [Mermaid: Service->>Cache: Inner same-start warm]
3. Audit within rect [Mermaid: Service->>Audit: Audit within rect]
4. Rect inside fragment [Mermaid: DB->>Audit: Rect inside fragment]
5. Outer different-start anchor [Mermaid: Service->>Audit: Outer different-start anchor]
6. Inner different-start anchor [Mermaid: DB->>Audit: Inner different-start anchor]
